academicResearch.title: Semantic Technologies for Cybersecurity Education Competencies: JSON-LD Implementation of Distributed Learning Analytics
academicResearch.researchGroup: University of Arizona Cybersecurity Research Lab
academicResearch.description: Implementation of semantic web technologies using JSON-LD for distributed learning analytics in cybersecurity education competency frameworks.

academicResearch.title: Graph Neural Networks for Automated Threat Categorization
academicResearch.researchGroup: University of Arizona Cybersecurity Research Lab
academicResearch.description: Cost-effective ML pipeline optimization reducing processing costs 89% through Graph Neural Network implementations for automated threat categorization at 40M+ URL scale.

academicResearch.title: Advanced NL2KQL Pipeline for Security Automation
academicResearch.researchGroup: University of Arizona Cybersecurity Research Lab
academicResearch.description: NL2KQL pipeline with schema validation, prompt normalization, and modular evaluation layers for LLM-driven security query generation.
